memory.authorizedDetail: Memory backend connected but not in use

model.defaultDetail: Not configured separately, tasks can still run

mcp.noneDetail: No external tools enabled, won't affect basic tasks

skill.noneDetail: No skills loaded, won't block getting started

page.noDetail: Confirm the current tab is accessible before starting

summary.errorDescription: No page context available. Confirm the tab is accessible before starting.
summary.successDescription: Core capabilities connected, ready to start tasks.
summary.warningDescription: Basic features are ready to use. Unconfigured items only affect complex tasks.

capability.title: What CoTabor can do for you
capability.description: CoTabor understands the current page and executes browser tasks toward your goals.
items: Read and summarize the current page
Extract key information and perform page actions
Complete multi-step tasks using memory, tools, and skills
